additional_verified_facts.baseline_statistics_source: Calculated from setup_task.sh image generation code with same parameters and random seed 42

privileged_info_summary: The noise filter evaluation task uses a synthetic 512×512 pixel fluorescence microscopy image generated with Python (PIL/NumPy) containing 20 synthetic cells on a background of intensity 30, with Gaussian noise (std=25). The task evaluates three filters: Gaussian Blur (sigma=2.0), Median (radius=2), and Mean (radius=2). All metadata values are accurately specified. The synthetic image has baseline statistics of Mean=42.90, StdDev=45.70, SNR=0.94. The data is not from a public dataset but locally generated for task reproducibility using fixed random seed 42.
